rulings.Case Title: CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER VS. FABIO CROCE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 22, 2017, Line 8: DEFENDANT FABIO CROCE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend to clearly allege Plaintiff's interest in the Premises and its standing to seek recovery of possession in its own name. The Court also note that the Lease attached to the Complaint is not legible (too dark) and Plaintiff should attach a legible copy of the lease to the Second Amended Complaint. =(501/REQ)
